lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated

Status mask.comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

RoutineControlType.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

lists.1: Left target contrast warning : check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
lists.2: Right target contrast warning : check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
lists.3: Right/Left target contrast warning : check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
lists.4: Left target position warning (too high)  : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.8: Left target position warning (too low)  : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.12: left target position warning high/low  :check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.16: Left target position warning (too much left)  : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.22: Left target position warning (too high) and Right target contrast warning and Left target position warning (too much left) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera and check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
lists.32: Left target position warning (too much right)  : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.64: Right target position warning (too high) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.128: Right target position warning (too low) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.136: Left target position warning (too low) and Right target position warning (too low) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.192: Right target position warning high/low : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.256: Right target position warning (too much left) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.512: Right target position warning (too much right) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.768: Right target position warning left/right : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.1024: Max roll range warning (forward looking clockwise) : check the installation of the camera
lists.2048: Max roll range warning (forward looking counterclockwise) : check the installation of the camera
lists.3072: Max roll range warning clockwise/counterclockwise : check the installation of the camera
lists.4096: Max yaw range warning (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 12)
lists.8192: Max yaw range warning (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 13)
lists.12288: Max yaw range warning clockwise/counterclockwise : check the installation of the camera
lists.16384: Max pitch range warning (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 14)
lists.32768: Max pitch range warning (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 15)
lists.49152: Max pitchl range warning up/down : check the installation of the camera
